$comment: D-TYPEINTERNER-OPERAND-SPAN-LIFETIME-GUARD regression: the shipped <string.h> memcpy is a MULTI-param FnSig (void*, const void*, size_t); calling it with address-of args (`&b`) used to dangle a retained fnParams() span in checkCallAgainstSig (the `&b` arg interns pointer<int> mid arg-check loop). UAF masked in Release (exit 42 by luck), caught on Debug (guard aborts the compile). Fix = copy the param span to an owned vector. b := a (42) via memcpy -> exit 42. RED-ON-DISABLE on a DEBUG-built compiler: revert the fix and this example fails to compile (guard abort).
